errors.qr_not_valid_desc: This QR code does not exist in our system.
errors.vehicle_blocked_desc: This vehicle has been blocked for security reasons.
errors.protection_expired_desc: The passport for this vehicle has expired.
errors.geolocation_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser. Please enter a location manually.
errors.location_failed: Unable to retrieve your location. Please enter a location manually below.
errors.location_permission_denied: Location permission denied. Please allow location access in your browser settings, or enter the location manually below.
errors.location_unavailable: Location unavailable. Please enter the location manually.
errors.location_timeout: Location timeout. Please enter the location manually or try again.
errors.error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
